calendarNotes: Classes begin August 10, 2026, and end May 26, 2027, with Spring Recess running March 29–April 2 — an especially important break for many cross-border families, since Mexican public schools typically break about two weeks later in mid-April. Indigenous Peoples' Day on October 12 is a non-instructional day, a California-specific school holiday that families arriving from other states sometimes discover only after missing it the first year. February brings two no-school days close together: Lincoln's Birthday on the 12th and Presidents' Day on the 15th — spread far enough apart to trip up childcare planning if you're not watching the calendar. Thanksgiving Break runs November 23–27; Winter Break begins December 21 and ends January 4. San Diego rarely sees the weather events that close schools elsewhere. Published dates rarely change, making it easier to book travel and arrange childcare without leaving much buffer for last-minute changes.
